category_title: Students with or at-risk for EBD who engage in disruptive behaviors such as wandering and bothering peers
minimal_context: The student is working on an arithmetic assignment during general classroom instruction.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's move on to the arithmetic section. Please complete the next five problems on your own.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Raises hand) I finished the first arithmetic problem.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep working on the rest of the page.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps hand raised) I don't know how to do the next one.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Drops hand, wanders out of seat to another student's desk while making a humming noise) Hey, what did you get for this one?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's move on to the arithmetic section. Please complete the next five problems on your own.

STUDENT: (Raises hand) I finished the first arithmetic problem.

TUTOR: Keep working on the rest of the page.

STUDENT: (Keeps hand raised) I don't know how to do the next one.

TUTOR: Just try your best.

STUDENT: (Drops hand, wanders out of seat to another student's desk while making a humming noise) Hey, what did you get for this one?
